violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (front entrance ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the (front counter prep shelves and donut display bottom shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
Hot water lacking at hand sinks in kitchen and front counter/prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The floors in back kitchen and front counter area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
Observed scoop with handle in direct contact with sugar.PIC removed scoop. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
